app.title: GitPM
auth.heading: Sign in to GitPM
auth.description: Use your GitLab project membership to continue.
locale.label: Language
drafts.heading: Drafts
drafts.cleanupConfirm: Clean up draft {id}? This removes its worktree and branch.
drafts.changedExternally: The worktree changed outside GitPM. Refresh before editing.
drafts.externalWarning: External writer mode is active. Editing actions are read-only.
drafts.localWarning: Changes are local to this draft until commit and push.
core.heading: Portfolio work
core.name: Name
core.title: Title
core.selectProject: Select a project to manage its work.
core.readOnly: Core editing is read-only for this draft.
admin.heading: Administration
admin.noServerConfig: Server and OAuth configuration is intentionally not exposed here.
changes.heading: Changes
changes.description: Review the exact Git diff, understand domain changes, and publish the whole draft.
changes.readOnly: Changes are read-only for this draft or role.
changes.discardConfirm: Discard every uncommitted change in this draft?
changes.cleanHint: The draft worktree matches its latest commit.
changes.publishHeading: Commit, push, and create a merge request
changes.commitAllHint: Alpha commits all changed files together; selective staging is not available.
changes.commitScope: All {count} changed files will be committed.
changes.alphaLimitations: Alpha limitation: one repository and one draft owner; commit always includes every changed file; merge-request options are limited to title and description.
history.heading: History
history.description: Inspect the commit graph, files, domain impact, and create a separate revert draft.
history.empty: Select a commit to inspect it.
history.author: Author
history.conflict: The revert draft has conflicts in {count} files and was opened in external mode.
board.heading: Board
board.description: Move Tasks between status columns and preserve reusable filtered views.
board.readOnly: The Board is read-only for this draft.
board.savedDescription: Save the current Project, status, and type filters as a Board view.
gantt.heading: Gantt
gantt.description: Read Task dates, hierarchy, milestones, and dependencies without changing repository data.
gantt.empty: No active Tasks with both start and due dates.
